name: Easy Milky Way Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 each 1 1/2 oz. Milky Way candy bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the lemon juice to the pie filling.
2. Pour into a prepared pie shell.
3. Thinly slice the candy bars over top.
4. Sprinkle with chopped nuts.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
6. Reduce temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Continue baking for an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
8. Cool and serve.
